description: Edit this file to tune experiments. Load with --config model_hyperparameters.json on train_hog_svm.py and train_export_tflite.py. CLI flags override these values. For fair classical vs deep comparison, keep split.seed and split fractions identical; tune traditional.C, hog_*, deep_learning.learning_rate, dropout, epochs, color_correct, etc. Reports: result/*/metrics_train_val_test.json, split_summary.json, hyperparameters_snapshot.json.
